title: Coaster Set of 6 Olive Green Coasters (10cm x 10cm). Made in The UK from Recycled Leather by Lara-May.
features: ✅ HAND MADE IN THE UK by Lara-May Ltd, using 76% Eco-Friendly recycled leather to create these timeless placemats and coasters
✅ THESE COASTERS WILL GRACE any formal or informal table setting. Mix and match colours to blend with your own interior setting. Summer colour collection is available to purchase now

✅ HEAT RESISTANT TO 90c making these mats perfect table-ware. You can be rest assured that your table is well protected with 2.7mm thick durable and hardwearing tablemats. With an easy to wipe clean surface these multi-use mats will come in very useful around the home
✅ 100% MONEY BACK GUARENTEE is our promise to you, if you are not completely satisfied with your new purchase. We will happily offer a full refund within 30 days of purchase
description: Product Description With the help of our friends who are 4th generation heel and sole-makers, we were able to tap into the recycled leather market and we began creating a recycled leather placemat and coaster range in an exciting range of current trending interior colours that will go with most decors. We can proudly say that our product is 76% recycled leather with the remainder 24% made up of a bonded rubber, creating a heat resistant mat to 90 degrees. Although we purchase our raw product from Recycling Plants in Europe, which incidentally started of here in the UK all other aspects are manufactured and then lovingly packed and finished by hand in the UK. With our new Lara-May packaging and gift boxes, all placemats will come beautifully presented, so you can be rest assured that it will make the perfect gift. All available in our Spring/Summer colour collection. All placemats can be purchased in individual sets, so you can create your own personal colour scheme in mixed colours. Place mat sets can be purchased in four, six and eight pieces; all sets individually packaged in a presentation box with our Lara-May Collection Logo. Suitable for all dining experiences Made from 76% bonded recycled leather Heat resistant to 90 degrees 2.7mm thick durable and hard-wearing tablemats Wipe clean mats, perfect for sticky moments Water-resistant Our large recycled leather placemats and coasters are handcrafted and made in Britain using 76% recycled bonded leather. Proudly made in the UK with care and attention. Easy to store When you are not using the placemats and/or coasters, you can store them straight into the drawer. Saving you storage on your table when needed. Heat Resistant Heat Resistant placemats. Resistant to 90 degrees, making this the perfect addition for all your dining experiences. Easy to clean Easy to clean, just wipe down with soapy water to remove those sticky mishaps, can also be ran under warm water for a more thorough clean. Lay flat to dry naturally.
